headline: Could This Healthcare Stock Help Make You Rich Over the Next Decade?
summary: Intuitive Surgical has already made many of its early investors wealthy.

headline: FDA Stapler Safety Scrutiny Puts Intuitive Surgical Q1 2026 In Focus
summary: FDA issues a safety communication on Intuitive Surgical's curved tip staplers after reports of serious injuries. Regulators flag potential safety, reputational, and operational risks tied to the stapler products. Upcoming Q1 2026 results are seen as an early test of how these regulatory pressures and competition affect the business. Intuitive Surgical, NasdaqGS:ISRG, enters this period under closer scrutiny as the FDA highlights safety concerns around its curved tip staplers. The stock...
